goal: subsemigroup_subset[S](a, b) = forall(x0: S) { a.contains(x0) implies b.contains(x0) }
proof: function[T0: Semigroup](x0: Subsemigroup[T0], x1: Subsemigroup[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = subsemigroup_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[S](a, b)
(forall(x0: S) { not x0 ∈ a or x0 ∈ b } = true)
function(x0: S) { not (x0 ∈ a and not x0 ∈ b) }(x)
let w0: S satisfy { w0 ∈ a and not w0 ∈ b }
function(x0: S) { not x0 ∈ a or x0 ∈ b }(w0)
let w0: S satisfy { w0 ∈ a and not w0 ∈ b }
function(x0: S) { not x0 ∈ a or x0 ∈ b }(w0)
function[T0: Semigroup](x0: Subsemigroup[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.as_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[S](a, x)
function[T0: Semigroup](x0: Subsemigroup[T0], x1: Subsemigroup[T0]) { not x0.as_set ⊂ x1.as_set or subsemigroup_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[S](a, b)
